title: Glochidion lativenium
intro: Glochidion lativenium, also known as the Chinese globe-fist, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. Bioactive constituents of Glochidion lativenium include flavonoids, triterpenoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. The most common herbal preparations made with Glochidion lativenium include decoctions, infusions, and dried extracts, often used to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
